MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ramon Burke, Esq., 415-931-4207, specially appearing for defendant and moving party James Earl

RULING:
NO OTHERAPPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JAMES EARL'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 473(b) ON THE BASIS OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. IN ANY EVENT, TREATING THE MOTION AS ONE UNDER CCP 473(d), IT WOULD BE GRANTED GIVEN THE LACK OF VALID SERVICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/LB)
